reflection.en: Learned from history: In bear markets, even with whale signals, wait for RSI extremes or wick confirmation to avoid floating losses (e.g., previous SOL position -11.94%). This decision is more cautious, prioritizing existing position management and only considering new entries based on strong whale accumulation signals.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观环境呈现矛盾信号：VIX高企（29.49）和DXY走强（98.99）显示风险规避，但日元疲软（USD/JPY 157.534）暗示风险偏好，整体驱动力为已定价的混合情绪，无明显新催化剂。参考【Qlib排名】，ETH（-0.0815分）和DOGE（-0.0968分）相对较强，但所有币种RSI均低于42（超卖边缘），Z-Score显示成交量异常低（vol_z < -1.15）和资金费率负值（funding_z < -0.66），表明零售恐慌和做空拥挤。【痛苦交易】中，SOL、BNB和BTC的多空爆仓比高（L/S > 4.53），显示零售多头被大量清洗，但燃料充足；ETH和DOGE的爆仓比平衡（L/S ~1.32），风险较低。结合【战场纪律】，避免在RSI 40+时接飞刀，优先等待极端RSI或鲸鱼积累信号。选择【假设分析】剧本为MEAN_REVERSION，基于超卖RSI和零售多头清洗，但需严格验证鲸鱼流向和拒绝影线。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), with mixed macro signals: high VIX (29.49) and strong DXY (98.99) indicate risk-off, but yen weakness (USD/JPY 157.534) suggests risk-on, overall driven by priced-in sentiment without new catalysts. Referencing 【Qlib rankings】, ETH (-0.0815 score) and DOGE (-0.0968 score) are relatively strong, but all coins have RSI below 42 (near oversold), with Z-Scores showing low volume anomalies (vol_z < -1.15) and negative funding (funding_z < -0.66), indicating retail panic and crowded shorts. In 【Pain Trade】, SOL, BNB, and BTC have high long/short liquidation ratios (L/S > 4.53), showing heavy retail long flush with ample fuel; ETH and DOGE have balanced ratios (L/S ~1.32), lower risk. Applying 【Tactical Discipline】, avoid catching falling knives at RSI 40+, prioritize waiting for extreme RSI or whale accumulation signals. Selected 【Scenario】 is MEAN_REVERSION, based on oversold RSI and retail long flush, but requires strict validation of whale flow and rejection wicks.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 最严重的冲突数据是：ETH和SOL的鲸鱼净流向显示代币流入交易所（ETH 24,430.1 ETH，SOL 150,613.8 SOL），这是分布信号，而非积累，与超卖RSI和负资金费率提供的做多理由相矛盾。忽略此风险的原因：1）当前熊市环境中，价格下跌伴随代币流入可能反映鲸鱼在低位派发而非托底，但RSI已接近超卖（ETH 41.42，SOL 38.75），且爆仓比高（SOL L/S=6.23），零售清洗提供反弹燃料；2）稳定币流向显示ETH有现金流入（$102,137），缓解部分分布压力；3）战术上，只考虑在RSI <30或出现长下影线时入场，避免盲目追多。
contrary_signal_check.en: The most significant contrary signal is: Whale net flow for ETH and SOL shows tokens flowing into exchanges (ETH 24,430.1 ETH, SOL 150,613.8 SOL), indicating distribution, not accumulation, contradicting the long rationale from oversold RSI and negative funding. This risk is ignored because: 1) In the current bear regime, price drop with token inflow may reflect whale distribution at lows, but RSI is near oversold (ETH 41.42, SOL 38.75) and high liquidation ratios (SOL L/S=6.23) provide bounce fuel from retail flush; 2) Stablecoin flow shows cash inflow for ETH ($102,137), mitigating some distribution pressure; 3) Tactically, only consider entries at RSI <30 or with long lower wicks to avoid chasing blindly.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种价格低于SMA50（熊市趋势），RSI在38-42区间（接近超卖），ADX在13-21（趋势弱），NATR在1.33%-2.28%（中等波动），上下影线比率显示ETH下影线54%（支撑强），SOL下影线41%（支撑中等），其他币种下影线较低。
technical_signal.en: Technical: All coins price below SMA50 (bearish trend), RSI in 38-42 range (near oversold), ADX 13-21 (weak trend), NATR 1.33%-2.28% (moderate volatility), wick ratios show ETH lower wick 54% (strong support), SOL lower wick 41% (moderate support), others have lower wicks.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH代币净流入交易所（分布），但稳定币流入（$102,137）；SOL代币净流入交易所（分布）且稳定币流出（$-409,455）。资金费率：ETH -0.0005%（轻微负值），SOL -0.0141%（负值显著），显示零售做空拥挤。爆仓比：SOL L/S=6.23（多头清洗），BNB L/S=2.23（多头清洗），BTC L/S=4.53（多头清洗），ETH L/S=1.32（平衡）。
macro_onchain.en: Whale flow: ETH token net inflow to exchanges (distribution), but stablecoin inflow ($102,137); SOL token net inflow to exchanges (distribution) with stablecoin outflow ($-409,455). Funding: ETH -0.0005% (slightly negative), SOL -0.0141% (significantly negative), indicating crowded retail shorts. Liquidation ratios: SOL L/S=6.23 (long flush), BNB L/S=2.23 (long flush), BTC L/S=4.53 (long flush), ETH L/S=1.32 (balanced).

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：ETH第一（-0.0815分），DOGE第二（-0.0968分），显示相对强势；但所有分数为负，整体市场弱。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score均低于-1.15（成交量极低），资金费率Z-Score负值（funding_z < -0.66），统计偏差表明市场冷清和做空过度。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib rankings: ETH first (-0.0815 score), DOGE second (-0.0968 score), showing relative strength; but all scores negative, overall market weak. Z-Score anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all below -1.15 (extremely low volume), funding Z-Scores negative (funding_z < -0.66), statistical deviations indicate market inactivity and excessive shorting.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1）RSI 38-42（接近超卖但未极端），ADX 13-21（趋势弱），NATR 1.33%-2.28%（波动中等）；2）影线比率：ETH下影线54%（强拒绝），SOL下影线41%（中等拒绝），其他较低；3）多空爆仓比：SOL、BNB、BTC高（L/S > 2.23），显示多头清洗，ETH平衡；4）鲸鱼净流向：ETH和SOL代币流入（分布）。最终判断：对于ETH和SOL为KNIFE（接飞刀风险），因为RSI未极端（>30）且鲸鱼分布，避免盲目做多；对于其他币种为SAFE_MR（安全均值回归潜力），但需等待RSI <30或鲸鱼积累信号。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 38-42 (near oversold but not extreme), ADX 13-21 (weak trend), NATR 1.33%-2.28% (moderate volatility); 2) Wick ratios: ETH lower wick 54% (strong rejection), SOL lower wick 41% (moderate rejection), others lower; 3) Liquidation long/short ratios: SOL, BNB, BTC high (L/S > 2.23) showing long flush, ETH balanced; 4) Whale net flow: ETH and SOL token inflow (distribution). Final verdict: For ETH and SOL, KNIFE (falling knife risk) as RSI not extreme (>30) and whale distribution, avoid blind longs; for others, SAFE_MR (safe mean reversion potential) but wait for RSI <30 or whale accumulation signals.

portfolio_status.zh: 当前持仓：BNB多头（-2.58%亏损），SOL多头（-2.13%亏损），ETH多头（0.47%盈利）。总风险：多头敞口$1493，可用多头空间$347（低于动态限制$1850）。持仓与市场熊市和超卖RSI一致，但需监控鲸鱼分布风险。

This decision is more cautious, prioritizing existing position management and only considering new entries based on strong whale accumulation signals.

analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), with macro risk-off signals (high VIX, strong DXY) aligning with negative crypto news like ETF outflows, yet prices haven't collapsed further, suggesting some bearishness is priced in. Qlib rankings show ETH as relatively strongest (-0.084 score), but all coins have negative scores, indicating overall weakness. Combining 【Pain Trade】, SOL, BNB, and BTC have L/S ratios >2.0, showing retail longs being heavily flushed, while funding rates are mostly negative (e.g., SOL -0.0139%), providing squeeze fuel, but we must wait for RSI <30 or lower wick confirmation to avoid catching falling knives. Selected 【Scenario】: WHALE_FRONT_RUN, betting on potential whale accumulation during retail panic.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 最严重的冲突风险：ETH的鲸鱼数据显示24小时净流入24,430.1 ETH（正流入），而稳定币净流入仅$102,137，这可能表明鲸鱼在向交易所转移代币进行派发，而非吸筹。忽略此信号的理由：1) 7日净流入相同，趋势未加速；2) 价格未立即下跌，且RSI 41.1接近超卖，结合负资金费率（-0.0019%）和多空爆仓比平衡（1.32），更可能为限价卖单建仓而非大规模抛售。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary risk: ETH whale data shows 24h token net inflow of 24,430.1 ETH (positive), with stablecoin net inflow only $102,137, suggesting whales may be moving tokens to exchanges for distribution, not accumulation. Reasons to ignore: 1) 7d net inflow is identical, no acceleration; 2) Price hasn't dropped immediately, RSI 41.1 is near oversold, combined with negative funding (-0.0019%) and balanced L/S ratio (1.32), it's more likely limit sell wall building than aggressive dumping.

macro_onchain.en: Whale flow & funding: ETH has positive token inflow but small stablecoin inflow, possibly neutral; SOL has token inflow 150,613.8 SOL and stablecoin outflow $-211,997, indicating whales may be buying SOL with stablecoins (accumulation sign). Funding rates are all negative (ETH -0.0018% to SOL -0.0139%), retail shorts crowded, providing squeeze potential. L/S ratios: SOL 6.23, BTC 4.53, BNB 2.23, retail longs being flushed.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：ETH第一（-0.084分），DOGE第二（-0.098分），BTC第三（-0.0999分），整体得分负值反映市场弱势。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score全为负（-1.16至-1.33），显示成交量低迷；资金费率Z-Score负值（-0.76至-1.85），统计上偏离均值，确认空头拥挤。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib rankings: ETH first (-0.084 score), DOGE second (-0.098), BTC third (-0.0999), all negative scores reflect market weakness. Z-Score anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all negative (-1.16 to -1.33), indicating low volume; Funding Z-Scores negative (-0.76 to -1.85), statistically deviating from mean, confirming short crowding.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 38-41（未极端超卖），ADX 13-21（趋势弱），NATR 1.33-2.28%（波动正常）；2) 下影线比率部分较高（如DOGE 36%），但上影线也存（SOL 22%）；3) 多空爆仓比高（SOL 6.23等），零售多头正被清洗；4) 鲸鱼净流向：SOL显示吸筹迹象（代币流入+稳定币流出），ETH中性。最终判断：WHALE_ACCUMULATION（鲸鱼托底吸筹），因SOL鲸鱼数据支持吸筹，且零售恐慌（高L/S比、负资金费率）提供机会，但RSI未<30，需谨慎避免接飞刀。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 38-41 (not extreme oversold), ADX 13-21 (weak trend), NATR 1.33-2.28% (normal volatility); 2) Lower wick ratios partially high (e.g., DOGE 36%), but upper wicks exist (SOL 22%); 3) High L/S ratios (SOL 6.23, etc.), retail longs being flushed; 4) Whale net flow: SOL shows accumulation signs (token inflow + stablecoin outflow), ETH neutral. Final verdict: WHALE_ACCUMULATION, as SOL whale data supports accumulation with retail panic (high L/S, negative funding) offering opportunity, but RSI not <30 requires caution to avoid catching falling knives.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观环境呈现风险规避（VIX高企、DXY走强），但日元疲软暗示部分风险资金流动，形成分歧。驱动力主要是技术性反弹与爆仓清理，而非基本面改变，属于已定价的熊市反弹。参考【Qlib排名】，ETH、BNB、SOL相对较强（负分较小），但所有币种RSI均在41-43区间，未达超卖（<30），且成交量Z-Score均为负值（-1.23至-1.36），显示反弹缺乏买盘支持。【痛苦交易】ETH、SOL、BNB、BTC的多空爆仓比均>2.5（最高BNB达156.9），表明零售多头正被大规模清洗，形成“燃料”，但L/S比过高意味着短期反弹可能受限；资金费率全为负值（-0.0026%至-0.0110%），零售空头拥挤，存在轧空潜力，但需等待RSI极端或下影线确认。【假设分析】选择“鲸鱼前跑”（WHALE_FRONT_RUN），基于ETH的鲸鱼积累信号（24小时净流入24,430 ETH + 稳定币净流入$102,137），在零售恐慌时跟随聪明钱。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), with a risk-off macro environment (high VIX, strong DXY), but Yen weakness suggests some risk-on flows, creating divergence. The driver is primarily technical bounce and liquidation cleanup, not fundamental change, making it a priced-in bear market rally. 【Qlib rankings】show ETH, BNB, SOL are relatively stronger (less negative scores), but all coins have RSI in 41-43 range (not oversold <30), and volume Z-Scores are negative (-1.23 to -1.36), indicating weak buying support. 【Pain Trade】L/S liquidation ratios for ETH, SOL, BNB, BTC are all >2.5 (BNB up to 156.9), showing retail longs being heavily flushed, providing 'fuel', but high L/S ratios limit short-term bounce potential; funding rates are all negative (-0.0026% to -0.0110%), indicating crowded retail shorts with squeeze potential, but need RSI extremes or wick confirmation. 【Scenario】Select 'WHALE_FRONT_RUN', based on ETH whale accumulation signal (24h net inflow 24,430 ETH + stablecoin inflow $102,137) to follow smart money during retail panic.

Justification for ignoring: Whale data (ETH net inflow + stablecoin inflow) shows smart money accumulating during dips, overriding technical weaknesses; high L/S ratios (e.g., ETH L/S=2.54) provide squeeze fuel; entry can be timed with 4H wick or RSI divergence.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（所有币种价格低于SMA200），没有突发新闻驱动，价格下跌属于熊市延续，已定价。Qlib排名显示ETH相对最强（-0.0531分），但所有币种得分均为负值，表明整体弱势。Z-Score显示成交量普遍偏低（vol_z约-1.0），资金费率Z-Score为负（funding_z最低-2.65），零售空头拥挤。结合【痛苦交易】，ETH、SOL、BNB、BTC均出现高多空爆仓比（L/S>2.0），零售多头被大量清洗，但价格未进一步暴跌，显示鲸鱼可能在托底吸筹。然而，SOL的24h鲸鱼净流入（16,924 SOL）伴随稳定币净流出（-$118,234），可能为交易所陷阱。选择【鲸鱼前跑】剧本，跟随ETH的鲸鱼积累信号，但避开SOL的潜在派发风险。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (all coins below SMA200) with no new impulse drivers; the price drop is a continuation of the bear trend, already priced in. Qlib rankings show ETH as relatively strongest (-0.0531 score), but all scores are negative, indicating overall weakness. Z-Scores reveal low volume (vol_z ~ -1.0) and negative funding Z-Scores (funding_z as low as -2.65), indicating crowded retail shorts. Combined with 【Pain Trade】, ETH, SOL, BNB, and BTC show high long/short liquidation ratios (L/S > 2.0), with retail longs heavily flushed, yet prices haven't collapsed further, suggesting whale accumulation. However, SOL's 24h whale net inflow (16,924 SOL) with stablecoin net outflow (-$118,234) may be an exchange trap. Selecting 【WHALE_FRONT_RUN】 scenario to follow ETH's whale accumulation signal while avoiding SOL's potential distribution risk.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 最严重的冲突数据：SOL的鲸鱼数据显示24h代币净流入（16,924 SOL）但稳定币净流出（-$118,234），这可能表明鲸鱼在向交易所转移代币进行派发，而非吸筹。同时，SOL的L/S爆仓比高达41.77，显示零售多头已被极端清洗，但价格未反弹，暗示燃料可能已耗尽。忽略此信号，因为ETH的鲸鱼数据更可靠（代币净流入24,430 ETH且稳定币净流入$102,137），且ETH在Qlib排名第一，相对强度更高。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signal: SOL's whale data shows 24h token net inflow (16,924 SOL) but stablecoin net outflow (-$118,234), which may indicate whales moving tokens to exchanges for distribution, not accumulation. Additionally, SOL's L/S liquidation ratio is extremely high at 41.77, showing retail longs heavily flushed, but price hasn't rebounded, suggesting fuel may be drained. This signal is ignored because ETH's whale data is more reliable (token net inflow 24,430 ETH with stablecoin net inflow $102,137), and ETH ranks first in Qlib with higher relative strength.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI在40-42区间（未超卖），ADX约18-21（趋势弱），NATR在1.44%-2.47%（中等波动）。ETH价格$1982.99低于SMA50（$2003.48），但上下影线比率显示下影线较长（57%），暗示支撑。
technical_signal.en: Technical summary: All coins have RSI in 40-42 range (not oversold), ADX ~18-21 (weak trend), NATR 1.44%-2.47% (moderate volatility). ETH price $1982.99 is below SMA50 ($2003.48), but lower wick ratio is high (57%), indicating support.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据与资金费率：ETH显示鲸鱼积累（24h代币净流入24,430 ETH，稳定币净流入$102,137），资金费率负（-0.0087%），零售空头拥挤。SOL的鲸鱼数据矛盾（代币流入但稳定币流出），资金费率负（-0.0045%）。全局宏观显示风险规避（DXY强，VIX高）。
macro_onchain.en: Whale flow & funding analysis: ETH shows whale accumulation (24h token net inflow 24,430 ETH, stablecoin net inflow $102,137) with negative funding (-0.0087%), indicating crowded retail shorts. SOL's whale data is contradictory (token inflow but stablecoin outflow), with negative funding (-0.0045%). Global macro shows risk-off (strong DXY, high VIX).

quantitative_analysis.zh: 分析Qlib排名：ETH排名第一（-0.0531分），相对最强，但所有币种得分均为负，整体市场弱势。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score普遍-1.0左右，显示低成交量；资金费率Z-Score为负（ETH最低-2.65），统计上显著偏离，确认零售空头过度拥挤。
quantitative_analysis.en: Analyze Qlib rankings: ETH ranks first (-0.0531 score), relatively strongest, but all scores are negative, indicating overall market weakness. Z-Score significance: Volume Z-Scores around -1.0 show low volume; funding Z-Scores are negative (ETH lowest at -2.65), statistically significant deviations confirming overcrowded retail shorts.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 42.16（未超卖），ADX 18.4（趋势弱），NATR 2.37%（中等波动）；2) 上下影线比率：上影线40%/下影线57%，下影线长显示支撑；3) 多空爆仓比：2.89（零售多头被清洗）；4) 鲸鱼净流向：代币净流入24,430 ETH，稳定币净流入$102,137。最终判断：WHALE_ACCUMULATION（鲸鱼托底），因为价格下跌中鲸鱼积累，零售多头被清洗提供轧空燃料，但RSI未极端超卖，需低杠杆入场。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 42.16 (not oversold), ADX 18.4 (weak trend), NATR 2.37% (moderate volatility); 2) Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: upper 40%/lower 57%, long lower wick shows support; 3) Liquidation long/short ratio: 2.89 (retail longs flushed); 4) Whale net flow direction: token net inflow 24,430 ETH, stablecoin net inflow $102,137. Conclude with explicit verdict: WHALE_ACCUMULATION, as whales are accumulating during price drop with retail longs flushed providing squeeze fuel, but RSI not extremely oversold requires low-leverage entry.

portfolio_status.zh: 当前持仓风险评估：持有SOL多头（浮亏-0.24%）和ETH多头（浮盈1.11%）。总多头敞口$1001，可用多头空间$845，未超限。SOL持仓需监控鲸鱼陷阱风险，ETH持仓符合积累信号可持有。
portfolio_status.en: Portfolio risk check: Holding SOL long (floating loss -0.24%) and ETH long (floating profit 1.11%). Total long exposure $1001, available long room $845, within limits. SOL position needs monitoring for whale trap risk; ETH position aligns with accumulation signal and can be held.

reflection.zh: 从历史交易中学到：在熊市中，即使有鲸鱼信号，也需等待RSI极端或影线确认以避免浮动亏损（如之前SOL仓位-11.94%）。本次决策更谨慎，优先管理现有仓位而非新开仓，仅调整ETH止损以锁定利润。
reflection.en: Learned from history: In bear markets, even with whale signals, wait for RSI extremes or wick confirmation to avoid floating losses (e.g., previous SOL position -11.94%). This decision is more cautious, prioritizing existing position management over new entries, only adjusting ETH stop loss to lock in profits.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观情绪极端恐惧（VIX 29.49），但日元疲软暗示部分风险偏好。新闻面显示加密扩张（OKX、哈萨克斯坦投资）与经济紧张并存，属于混合叙事，无明显新驱动力，价格下跌可能已部分定价悲观情绪。【Qlib排名】显示ETH（-0.0558）和BNB（-0.0604）相对最强，但所有币种得分均为负值，表明整体市场疲软；Z-Score异常显示成交量普遍偏低（Vol_Z均<-1.0），资金费率Z-Score为负（如ETH -2.33），表明零售空头拥挤。【痛苦交易】ETH、SOL、BNB的L/S爆仓比均>2.0（ETH 2.72，SOL 41.77，BNB 160.33），显示零售多头正被大量清洗，形成“燃料”供潜在轧空；但需警惕L/S比极高（如BNB 160.33）可能耗尽燃料。【假设分析】选择WHALE_FRONT_RUN剧本，基于鲸鱼积累信号（如ETH Token Net Flow 24h=105,500 ETH流入）与零售恐慌（负资金费率、高L/S比）的背离，跟随聪明钱在熊市中低杠杆买入。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200) with extreme fear (VIX 29.49), but Yen weakness suggests some risk appetite. News shows mixed narratives (crypto expansion vs economic nervousness), with no clear new impulse; price declines may have partially priced in pessimism.【Qlib Ratings】ETH (-0.0558) and BNB (-0.0604) rank strongest, but all scores are negative, indicating overall weakness; Z-Score anomalies show low volume (Vol_Z all <-1.0) and negative funding Z-Scores (e.g., ETH -2.33), signaling crowded retail shorts.【Pain Trade】L/S liquidation ratios for ETH, SOL, and BNB are all >2.0 (ETH 2.72, SOL 41.77, BNB 160.33), indicating heavy retail long flushing and potential squeeze fuel; but high ratios (e.g., BNB 160.33) risk fuel exhaustion.【Scenario】Select WHALE_FRONT_RUN, betting on whale accumulation signals (e.g., ETH Token Net Flow 24h=105,500 ETH inflow) diverging from retail panic (negative funding, high L/S ratios), using low leverage in bear market.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 最严重的冲突数据：1）市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），通常应偏向做空，但鲸鱼积累信号强烈；2）BNB的L/S爆仓比高达160.33，可能已耗尽轧空燃料，增加反转风险。忽略理由：在熊市中，鲸鱼积累是罕见的高置信度信号，且ETH的L/S比（2.72）更适中，提供更安全燃料；通过低杠杆（2x）和严格止损管理风险。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals: 1) Bear market (price < SMA200) typically favors shorts, but whale accumulation is strong; 2) BNB's L/S ratio is extremely high (160.33), potentially exhausting squeeze fuel and increasing reversal risk. Justification for ignoring: In bear markets, whale accumulation is a rare high-conviction signal, and ETH's L/S ratio (2.72) is more moderate for safer fuel; risk is managed via low leverage (2x) and strict stop-loss.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI在40-42区间（如ETH 42.07，BTC 40.34），处于中性偏弱但未超卖；ADX普遍<21（如ETH 18.4），趋势强度弱；NATR在1.43%-2.47%（如ETH 2.37%），波动率适中；上下影线比率显示ETH下影线57%较高，表明支撑。
technical_signal.en: Technical: All coins have RSI in 40-42 range (e.g., ETH 42.07, BTC 40.34), neutral-weak but not oversold; ADX mostly <21 (e.g., ETH 18.4), weak trend strength; NATR 1.43%-2.47% (e.g., ETH 2.37%), moderate volatility; Wick ratios show ETH lower wick 57% high, indicating support.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH显示Token Net Flow 24h=105,500 ETH流入（7d趋势一致），Stablecoin Net Flow $102,137流入，表明鲸鱼在价格下跌时积累；资金费率均为负（如ETH -0.0072%），零售空头拥挤。BTC、BNB、DOGE无链上数据，依赖技术指标。
macro_onchain.en: Whale flow: ETH shows Token Net Flow 24h=105,500 ETH inflow (consistent 7d trend) and Stablecoin Net Flow $102,137 inflow, indicating whale accumulation during price drop; funding rates are negative (e.g., ETH -0.0072%), crowded retail shorts. BTC, BNB, DOGE lack on-chain data, relying on technicals.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：ETH排名第1（得分-0.0558），BNB第2（-0.0604），相对最强但得分均为负，反映市场整体疲软。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score均<-1.0（如SOL -1.22），表明交易清淡；资金费率Z-Score显著为负（ETH -2.33），统计偏差显示零售空头极端拥挤。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib analysis: ETH ranks 1st (score -0.0558), BNB 2nd (-0.0604), relatively strongest but all scores negative, reflecting overall market weakness. Z-Score anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all <-1.0 (e.g., SOL -1.22), indicating low activity; funding Z-Scores significantly negative (ETH -2.33), statistical deviation shows extreme retail short crowding.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1）RSI 40-42未超卖，ADX<21趋势弱，NATR适中；2）ETH下影线比率57%高，显示支撑；3）L/S爆仓比ETH 2.72，SOL 41.77，BNB 160.33，零售多头被清洗；4）鲸鱼净流向ETH为正（流入）。最终判断：WHALE_ACCUMULATION（鲸鱼托底吸筹），因价格下跌中鲸鱼积累、零售恐慌（负资金费率、高L/S比），但需注意RSI未<30，避免接飞刀。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 40-42 not oversold, ADX<21 weak trend, NATR moderate; 2) ETH lower wick ratio 57% high, showing support; 3) L/S ratios ETH 2.72, SOL 41.77, BNB 160.33, retail longs flushed; 4) Whale net flow ETH positive (inflow). Verdict: WHALE_ACCUMULATION, due to whale accumulation during price drop and retail panic (negative funding, high L/S ratios), but caution as RSI not <30 to avoid catching knives.

portfolio_status.zh: 当前持仓：SOL多头（入场价84.45，浮盈0.21%），ETH多头（入场价1972.04，浮盈1.09%），总风险敞口$1002，可用多头额度$844。持仓理由仍有效（鲸鱼积累），但需监控阻力位（如ETH前高2081.75）。
portfolio_status.en: Portfolio: SOL long (entry 84.45, PnL 0.21%), ETH long (entry 1972.04, PnL 1.09%), total exposure $1002, available long room $844. Thesis still valid (whale accumulation), but monitor resistance (e.g., ETH prev high 2081.75).

reflection.zh: 从历史交易中学到：在熊市中，即使有鲸鱼信号，也需等待RSI极端或影线确认以避免浮动亏损（如之前SOL仓位-11.94%）。本次决策更谨慎，优先管理现有仓位而非新开仓。
reflection.en: Learned from history: In bear markets, even with whale signals, wait for RSI extremes or wick confirmation to avoid floating losses (e.g., previous SOL position -11.94%). This decision is more cautious, prioritizing existing position management over new entries.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观环境呈现风险规避（DXY走强，VIX高位），但日元疲软暗示部分风险偏好。Qlib排名显示BNB相对最强（排名1），但所有币种qlib_score均为负值，表明整体市场疲软。资金费率Z-Score普遍为负（BNB -1.45，ETH -1.64），显示零售空头拥挤，存在轧空潜力。结合【痛苦交易】，BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB的L/S爆仓比均大于2.5（最高BNB达164.15），表明零售多头正被大量清洗，为反弹提供燃料。然而，技术面RSI在40-44区间（未超卖），ADX低于21（趋势弱），缺乏明确反转信号。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼前置）：等待鲸鱼积累信号（如ETH/SOL的Token Net Flow转负）或RSI跌破30的极端情况，再考虑低杠杆做多。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), with a risk-off macro backdrop (strong DXY, high VIX), though Yen weakness hints at some risk appetite. Qlib rankings show BNB as relatively strongest (rank 1), but all coins have negative qlib_scores, indicating overall weakness. Funding Z-Scores are universally negative (BNB -1.45, ETH -1.64), showing crowded retail shorts and squeeze potential. Combined with 【Pain Trade】, L/S liquidation ratios for BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB are all >2.5 (BNB高达164.15), indicating massive retail long flushes, providing fuel for a bounce. However, technicals show RSI in 40-44 range (not oversold), ADX <21 (weak trend), lacking clear reversal signals. Selected 【Hypothesis】Scenario 3 (Whale Front-Run): Wait for whale accumulation signals (e.g., negative Token Net Flow for ETH/SOL) or RSI dropping below 30 extremes before considering low-leverage longs.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI在40-44区间（中性偏弱，未超卖），ADX低于21（趋势弱），NATR在1.43%-2.47%（中等波动）。价格均低于4H SMA50（-0.56%至-2.77%），显示短期下跌趋势。上下影线比率显示ETH（上影39%/下影57%）和DOGE（上影33%/下影39%）有支撑迹象，但整体缺乏强劲反转信号。
technical_signal.en: Technicals: All coins have RSI in 40-44 range (neutral-weak, not oversold), ADX <21 (weak trend), NATR 1.43%-2.47% (moderate volatility). Prices are below 4H SMA50 (-0.56% to -2.77%), indicating short-term downtrend. Wick ratios show support signs for ETH (upper 39%/lower 57%) and DOGE (upper 33%/lower 39%), but overall lack strong reversal signals.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH和SOL的Token Net Flow在24h内为正（ETH 0.0，SOL 8,456.5），但7d趋势持平，未显示加速积累。稳定币净流量为负（SOL -$23,201），暗示流动性流出。资金费率均为负（BNB -0.0065%最负），Z-Score显著为负，零售空头拥挤。爆仓数据：BNB L/S比164.15（极高），ETH 2.72，SOL 41.77，BTC 3.50，显示零售多头正被大量清洗，为潜在轧空提供燃料。
macro_onchain.en: Whale Data: ETH and SOL have positive Token Net Flow over 24h (ETH 0.0, SOL 8,456.5), but 7d trends are flat, showing no accelerated accumulation. Stablecoin Net Flow is negative (SOL -$23,201), hinting at liquidity outflow. Funding rates are all negative (BNB -0.0065% most negative), with significantly negative Z-Scores, indicating crowded retail shorts. Liquidation data: BNB L/S ratio 164.15 (extremely high), ETH 2.72, SOL 41.77, BTC 3.50, showing massive retail long flushes, providing fuel for potential squeezes.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：BNB排名第1（qlib_score -0.0503），相对最强，但得分仍为负，反映市场疲软。ETH排名第2（-0.0608），DOGE第3（-0.0717），SOL第4（-0.0718），BTC第5（-0.0760）。成交量Z-Score普遍为负（-1.2至-1.27），显示低成交量环境。资金费率Z-Score异常显著（BNB -1.45，ETH -1.64），支持零售空头拥挤的叙事，但需结合鲸鱼流向验证。
quantitative_analysis.en: Quantitative Analysis: Qlib shows BNB rank 1 (qlib_score -0.0503), relatively strongest but still negative, reflecting market weakness. ETH rank 2 (-0.0608), DOGE 3 (-0.0717), SOL 4 (-0.0718), BTC 5 (-0.0760). Volume Z-Scores are universally negative (-1.2 to -1.27), indicating low-volume environment. Funding Z-Scores are significantly anomalous (BNB -1.45, ETH -1.64), supporting the crowded retail shorts narrative, but need validation with whale flows.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 40-44（未极端），ADX <21（趋势弱），NATR中等；2) 上下影线比率显示部分支撑（ETH下影57%），但整体不强烈；3) 多空爆仓比极高（BNB 164.15，SOL 41.77），零售多头正被清洗；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH和SOL的Token Net Flow为正但未加速，稳定币流出。最终判断：WHALE_ACCUMULATION（潜在）但未确认，因为鲸鱼流向不明确且RSI未超卖。当前处于熊市，避免接飞刀（KNIFE风险），等待更清晰信号。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 40-44 (not extreme), ADX <21 (weak trend), NATR moderate; 2) Wick ratios show some support (ETH lower 57%), but not strong overall; 3) L/S liquidation ratios extremely high (BNB 164.15, SOL 41.77), retail longs being flushed; 4) Whale net flow: ETH and SOL Token Net Flow positive but not accelerating, stablecoin outflow. Final verdict: POTENTIAL WHALE_ACCUMULATION but unconfirmed, due to ambiguous whale flows and RSI not oversold. In bear regime, avoid catching falling knives (KNIFE risk), wait for clearer signals.

Total long exposure $1002, available long room $844, within limits. Risk is low, but monitor for pullback risks in bear regime. Recommend holding existing positions, awaiting market confirmation.

reflection.en: Learned from history: In bear markets, even with whale signals, wait for RSI extremes or wick confirmation to avoid floating losses (e.g., previous SOL position -11.94%). This decision is more cautious, prioritizing existing position management over new entries.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观风险情绪明显（VIX 29.49，DXY 98.99），但鲸鱼数据与零售情绪出现关键分歧。Qlib排名显示ETH、BNB相对最强（排名1-2），但Z-Score显示所有币种成交量均显著偏低（vol_z < -1.2），市场流动性萎缩。【痛苦交易】ETH、SOL、BNB、BTC均出现极端多头爆仓（L/S比率3.16-165.69），零售恐慌性抛售，但ETH和SOL的鲸鱼净流入（24h分别为-51.9万和+59.5万ETH/SOL）表明鲸鱼在趁机吸筹，形成“鲸鱼托底”陷阱。【假设分析】选择“鲸鱼前端交易”剧本：跟随鲸鱼在零售爆仓恐慌中低杠杆买入，但严格避免RSI未达极值的左侧交易。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality】Market is in bear regime (price < SMA200) with clear macro risk-off signals (VIX 29.49, DXY 98.99), but whale data diverges from retail sentiment. Qlib ranks ETH and BNB strongest (ranks 1-2), yet Z-Scores show all coins have significantly low volume (vol_z < -1.2), indicating liquidity contraction.【Pain Trade】ETH, SOL, BNB, BTC all show extreme long liquidations (L/S ratios 3.16-165.69) – retail panic selling – but ETH and SOL have whale net inflows (24h: -519k ETH, +595k SOL), suggesting whales are accumulating during the flush, creating a 'whale accumulation' trap.【Scenario】Select 'Whale Front-Run' playbook: follow whales with low leverage during retail capitulation, but strictly avoid left-side entries without extreme RSI.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面普遍超卖：ETH RSI 41.9，SOL RSI 40.2，BNB RSI 42.0，BTC RSI 39.4，均接近但未达30极值；ADX普遍<21（趋势弱）；波动率低（NATR 1.4-2.4%）。
technical_signal.en: Technicals broadly oversold: ETH RSI 41.9, SOL RSI 40.2, BNB RSI 42.0, BTC RSI 39.4 – all near but not at 30 extreme; ADX mostly <21 (weak trend); low volatility (NATR 1.4-2.4%).

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼流向：ETH 24h净流出-51.9万ETH（但7d净流出-305万，流出放缓），SOL 24h净流入+59.5万SOL（7d净流入+358万，加速吸筹）；资金费率全为负（ETH -0.0020%，SOL -0.0023%，BNB -0.0069%），零售做空拥挤。爆仓数据：ETH多头爆仓$7226万（L/S=3.16），SOL多头爆仓$190万（L/S=42.95），BNB多头爆仓$1575万（L/S=165.69），显示零售多头正被大规模清洗。
macro_onchain.en: Whale flows: ETH 24h net outflow -519k ETH (but 7d outflow -3.05M, slowing), SOL 24h net inflow +595k SOL (7d inflow +3.58M, accelerating accumulation); funding rates all negative (ETH -0.0020%, SOL -0.0023%, BNB -0.0069%) – retail shorts crowded. Liquidations: ETH longs $72.3M (L/S=3.16), SOL longs $1.9M (L/S=42.95), BNB longs $15.8M (L/S=165.69) – retail longs being massively flushed.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：ETH（-0.0786分，排名1）和BNB（-0.0789分，排名2）相对最强，但所有币种分数均为负，整体市场疲软。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score全部<-1.2（ETH -1.27，SOL -1.44），显示成交量统计性显著偏低，市场参与度不足；资金费率Z-Score全为负（ETH -1.13，BNB -1.51），确认做空情绪极端。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib ranks: ETH (-0.0786 score, rank 1) and BNB (-0.0789 score, rank 2) are relatively strongest, but all scores negative indicating overall market weakness. Z-Score anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all <-1.2 (ETH -1.27, SOL -1.44) – statistically significant low volume, poor market participation; Funding Z-Scores all negative (ETH -1.13, BNB -1.51) confirming extreme short sentiment.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】1) RSI 39-42（未达<30极值），ADX 18-21（趋势弱），NATR 1.4-2.4%（波动适中）；2) 影线比率：ETH下影36%/上影21%，SOL下影0%/上影9%，显示ETH有支撑但SOL无；3) 多空爆仓比：ETH 3.16，SOL 42.95，BNB 165.69（极端多头爆仓）；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH 24h净流出（但7d趋势改善），SOL 24h净流入（加速）。结论：ETH为WHALE_ACCUMULATION（价格下跌中鲸鱼放缓流出，零售多头爆仓提供燃料），SOL为WHALE_ACCUMULATION（价格下跌中鲸鱼加速流入，零售多头爆仓极端），但两者RSI未达极值，需谨慎避免左侧交易。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】1) RSI 39-42 (not at <30 extreme), ADX 18-21 (weak trend), NATR 1.4-2.4% (moderate vol); 2) Wick ratios: ETH lower 36%/upper 21%, SOL lower 0%/upper 9% – ETH shows support, SOL does not; 3) L/S liquidation ratios: ETH 3.16, SOL 42.95, BNB 165.69 (extreme long flush); 4) Whale net flow: ETH 24h outflow (but 7d trend improving), SOL 24h inflow (accelerating). Verdict: ETH = WHALE_ACCUMULATION (whales slowing outflow during price drop, retail long flush provides fuel), SOL = WHALE_ACCUMULATION (whales accelerating inflow during price drop, extreme retail long flush), but both RSI not at extreme – caution to avoid left-side entries.

portfolio_status.zh: 当前持仓：SOL多头（入场价$84.45，浮亏-0.54%），ETH多头（入场价$1972.04，浮盈+0.96%）。总风险暴露$1000（长仓），可用长仓额度$845，未超限。需管理浮亏的SOL头寸。
portfolio_status.en: Current positions: SOL long (entry $84.45, PnL -0.54%), ETH long (entry $1972.04, PnL +0.96%). Total exposure $1000 (long), available long room $845 – within limits. Need to manage floating loss on SOL.

reflection.zh: 从历史交易反思：在熊市中，即使有鲸鱼信号，也需等待RSI极值或影线确认以避免浮动亏损（如前次SOL头寸-11.94%）。本次决策更谨慎，优先管理现有头寸而非新开仓。
reflection.en: Reflection from history: In bear markets, even with whale signals, wait for RSI extremes or wick confirmation to avoid floating losses (e.g., previous SOL position -11.94%). This decision is more cautious, prioritizing existing position management over new entries.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市，宏观信号矛盾（美联储降息预期与VIX飙升、DXY走强并存），但无突发新闻驱动，价格下跌更多反映技术性抛售与零售恐慌，而非新利空。Qlib排名显示DOGE相对最强（-0.0719分），但整体评分均为负值，表明市场普遍疲软；Z-Score显示成交量普遍低迷（vol_z均<-1.25），资金费率除SOL外均为负或中性，暗示零售情绪悲观。结合【痛苦交易】，ETH、SOL、BTC、BNB均出现极端多头爆仓（L/S比率>3），显示零售多头正被大规模清洗，但价格未出现RSI<30的极端超卖或明确下影线支撑，属于“爆仓踩踏”中期，燃料仍在消耗。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼前导），优先关注ETH因鲸鱼24小时净流入加速（-116K ETH vs 7d -3.6M ETH，显示抛压减缓）且资金费率负值，但需等待RSI<30或下影线确认避免接飞刀。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime with conflicting macro signals (Fed cut expectations vs soaring VIX and strong DXY), but no breaking news drives the move; the price drop reflects technical selling and retail panic rather than new negatives. Qlib rankings show DOGE as relatively strongest (-0.0719 score), but all scores are negative, indicating broad weakness; Z-Scores show universally low volume (vol_z all <-1.25) and funding rates negative or neutral except for SOL, suggesting pessimistic retail sentiment. Combining 【Pain Trade】, ETH, SOL, BTC, and BNB all show extreme long liquidations (L/S ratios >3), indicating massive retail long flush, but prices lack RSI<30 extreme oversold or clear lower wick support, placing this in a mid-stage 'liquidation cascade' with fuel still burning. Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run), prioritizing ETH due to accelerating whale net inflow in 24h (-116K ETH vs 7d -3.6M ETH, showing reduced selling pressure) and negative funding, but awaiting RSI<30 or lower wick confirmation to avoid catching a falling knife.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI约40-42（中性偏弱），ADX<21（趋势弱），NATR 1.5%-2.6%（中等波动），布林带宽度收窄，上下影线比率显示ETH下影线45%（较强支撑迹象）、SOL下影线52%（支撑强），但DOGE上影线33%显示阻力。整体处于下跌趋势中的盘整阶段。
technical_signal.en: Technical: All coins have RSI around 40-42 (neutral-weak), ADX<21 (weak trend), NATR 1.5%-2.6% (moderate volatility), Bollinger Width narrowing, wick ratios show ETH lower wick 45% (strong support sign), SOL lower wick 52% (strong support), but DOGE upper wick 33% indicates resistance. Overall in a consolidation phase within a downtrend.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH 24小时净流出-116K ETH（较7d趋势-3.6M ETH减缓），稳定币净流出-$20.8M，资金费率-0.0058%（负值），24小时多头爆仓$73.4M vs 空头$24.4M（L/S=3.01）。SOL 24小时净流入595K SOL（加速积累），稳定币净流出-$63K，资金费率+0.0059%（正值），24小时多头爆仓$1.85M vs 空头$45K（L/S=41.11）。BTC、BNB、DOGE无鲸鱼流向数据，但均有多头爆仓优势（L/S>3）。
macro_onchain.en: Whale Data: ETH 24h net outflow -116K ETH (slowing vs 7d trend -3.6M ETH), stablecoin net outflow -$20.8M, funding -0.0058% (negative), 24h long liq $73.4M vs short $24.4M (L/S=3.01). SOL 24h net inflow 595K SOL (accelerating accumulation), stablecoin net outflow -$63K, funding +0.0059% (positive), 24h long liq $1.85M vs short $45K (L/S=41.11). BTC, BNB, DOGE lack whale flow data but all show long liquidation dominance (L/S>3).

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：DOGE排名第一（-0.0719分），相对最强，但整体评分负值且差距小（-0.0719至-0.0957），市场无突出强势币。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score均<-1.25（显著低于均值），资金费率Z-Score中ETH为-2.08（极端负值，零售空头拥挤），SOL为0.82（略偏正）。这支持ETH的轧空潜力，但需警惕低成交量下的假突破。
quantitative_analysis.en: Quantitative Analysis: Qlib shows DOGE rank 1 (-0.0719 score), relatively strongest, but all scores negative and close (-0.0719 to -0.0957), indicating no standout strength. Z-Score anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all <-1.25 (significantly below mean), Funding Z-Score for ETH is -2.08 (extremely negative, crowded retail shorts), SOL is 0.82 (slightly positive). This supports ETH squeeze potential but warns of false breaks amid low volume.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 40-42（中性）、ADX<21（弱趋势）、NATR中等；2) 影线比率：ETH下影线45%、SOL下影线52%（支撑强），DOGE上影线33%（阻力）；3) 多空爆仓比：ETH L/S=3.01、SOL L/S=41.11（极端多头爆仓）；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH 24h流出减缓（潜在积累迹象）、SOL 24h流入加速（明确积累）。结论：ETH为WHALE_ACCUMULATION（鲸鱼托底），因价格下跌中鲸鱼抛压减缓、零售多头被清洗，但RSI未<30且无明确下影线确认，暂不行动；SOL为WHALE_ACCUMULATION，但资金费率正且RSI未<30，需等待；其他币种为KNIFE（接飞刀），因无鲸鱼数据且RSI未极端。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 40-42 (neutral), ADX<21 (weak trend), NATR moderate; 2) Wick Ratios: ETH lower 45%, SOL lower 52% (strong support), DOGE upper 33% (resistance); 3) Liquidation L/S ratios: ETH 3.01, SOL 41.11 (extreme long flush); 4) Whale net flow: ETH 24h outflow slowing (potential accumulation sign), SOL 24h inflow accelerating (clear accumulation). Verdict: ETH is WHALE_ACCUMULATION, as whales reduce selling during price drop and retail longs are flushed, but RSI not <30 and no clear lower wick confirmation, so no action yet; SOL is WHALE_ACCUMULATION, but funding positive and RSI not <30, await; others are KNIFE, due to lack of whale data and non-extreme RSI.

reflection.en: Reflection from history: In bear markets, even with whale signals, wait for RSI extremes or wick confirmation to avoid floating losses (e.g., previous SOL position -11.94%). This decision is more cautious, prioritizing existing position management over new entries.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市恐慌阶段，尽管美联储转向鸽派预期，但VIX飙升、DXY走强、BTC恐惧贪婪指数12显示极端恐惧，表明流动性信号极度风险规避，价格下跌与宏观利好形成背离，属于“坏消息+好价格”的潜在鲸鱼吸筹陷阱。参考【Qlib排名】DOGE、BTC、SOL位列前三，但得分均为负值，整体市场疲软；【Z-Score异常】所有币种成交量Z-Score均低于-1.35，显示成交量极度萎缩，市场流动性枯竭，可能酝酿反转。结合【痛苦交易】ETH、SOL、BTC、BNB均出现极端多头爆仓（L/S比率>3.6），零售恐慌性抛售，而鲸鱼数据显示ETH和SOL在24小时内净流入（ETH 12.6万枚，SOL 51.2万枚），形成“鲸鱼托底吸筹”信号；【战场纪律】避免在RSI中性（40-50）时追空或抄底，需等待明确支撑确认。选择【假设分析】剧本3“鲸鱼前跑”，跟随鲸鱼在零售恐慌时积累头寸。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bearish panic phase, with dovish Fed expectations contradicted by extreme risk-off liquidity signals (VIX surge, DXY strength, BTC Fear & Greed Index at 12), creating a divergence where prices fall despite macro positives—a potential whale accumulation trap. 【Qlib Ratings】DOGE, BTC, and SOL rank top three but all have negative scores, indicating overall weakness; 【Z-Score Anomalies】All coins show volume Z-Scores below -1.35, signaling extreme volume contraction and liquidity drying up, which may precede a reversal. 【Pain Trade】ETH, SOL, BTC, and BNB exhibit extreme long liquidations (L/S ratios >3.6), indicating retail panic selling, while whale data shows net inflows for ETH (126k tokens) and SOL (512k tokens) over 24h, forming a 'whale accumulation' signal. 【Tactical Discipline】Avoid chasing shorts or buying dips at neutral RSI (40-50); wait for clear support confirmation. Selected 【Scenario】3 'Whale Front-Run', betting on smart money accumulation during retail panic.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI在41-44区间，处于中性偏弱，未达超卖（<30）；ADX在14.6-21.1，趋势强度中等；NATR在1.55%-2.67%，波动率适中；上下影线比率显示ETH（上37%/下44%）和SOL（上20%/下28%）有较长下影线，暗示支撑。
technical_signal.en: Technical: All coins have RSI in 41-44 range, neutral-weak but not oversold (<30); ADX 14.6-21.1, moderate trend strength; NATR 1.55%-2.67%, moderate volatility; Wick ratios show ETH (up 37%/down 44%) and SOL (up 20%/down 28%) with long lower wicks, indicating support.

macro_onchain.en: Whale Data: ETH 24h net inflow 126k tokens (7d net outflow -3.41M), accelerating accumulation; SOL 24h net inflow 512k tokens (7d net inflow 3.47M), sustained accumulation. Funding Rates: ETH -0.0019% (negative, retail short crowding), SOL 0.0009% (slightly positive). Liquidation Ratios: ETH L/S=3.62, SOL L/S=45.02, BTC L/S=3.81, BNB L/S=166.43, showing extreme long liquidations and retail pain.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：DOGE排名第一（得分-0.0572），BTC第二（-0.0801），SOL第三（-0.0855），但所有得分均为负，反映市场整体疲软。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score全部低于-1.35（DOGE -1.44，BTC -1.43，SOL -1.61，BNB -1.41，ETH -1.35），统计上显著偏离均值，表明成交量极度萎缩，常预示反转；资金费率Z-Score中ETH -1.2为显著负值，支持轧空潜力。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib Analysis: DOGE ranks 1st (score -0.0572), BTC 2nd (-0.0801), SOL 3rd (-0.0855), but all scores negative, reflecting overall market weakness. Z-Score Anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all below -1.35 (DOGE -1.44, BTC -1.43, SOL -1.61, BNB -1.41, ETH -1.35), statistically significant deviations indicating extreme volume contraction, often preceding reversals; Funding Z-Score for ETH -1.2 is significantly negative, supporting squeeze potential.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 41-44中性偏弱，ADX 14.6-21.1中等趋势，NATR 1.55%-2.67%波动适中；2) 上下影线比率显示ETH和SOL有较长下影线（支撑信号）；3) 多空爆仓比极端偏向多头爆仓（L/S>3.6），零售痛苦；4) 鲸鱼净流向ETH和SOL为正向流入。最终判断：WHALE_ACCUMULATION（鲸鱼托底），因为价格下跌中鲸鱼积极吸筹，零售多头被大量爆仓，但RSI未达超卖，需谨慎入场。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 41-44 neutral-weak, ADX 14.6-21.1 moderate trend, NATR 1.55%-2.67% moderate volatility; 2) Wick ratios show long lower wicks for ETH and SOL (support signal); 3) Liquidation long/short ratios extremely skewed to long liquidations (L/S>3.6), retail pain; 4) Whale net flow positive for ETH and SOL. Final verdict: WHALE_ACCUMULATION, as whales are accumulating during price drops with retail longs heavily flushed, but RSI not oversold requires cautious entry.

This decision is based on whale accumulation signals, but uses low leverage and small position size to manage volatility.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市，宏观环境谨慎（VIX高、DXY强），但日元疲软暗示部分风险偏好。新闻面偏空，但已部分定价。Qlib排名显示BNB、SOL相对最强，但所有币种得分均为负值，表明整体弱势。结合【痛苦交易】分析，ETH、SOL、BTC、BNB均出现极端多头爆仓（L/S比率>4），显示零售恐慌性抛售，而ETH和SOL的鲸鱼净流入（24h）表明聪明资金正在吸筹，形成【鲸鱼托底】信号。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼前跑），跟随鲸鱼在零售恐慌时买入，但严格限制杠杆和仓位。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime with cautious macro (high VIX, strong DXY), but Yen weakness hints at some risk-on appetite. News is bearish but partially priced in. Qlib rankings show BNB and SOL as relatively strongest, yet all coins have negative scores, indicating overall weakness. 【Pain Trade】analysis reveals extreme long liquidations (L/S ratio >4) in ETH, SOL, BTC, and BNB, signaling retail panic selling, while ETH and SOL show whale net inflows (24h), indicating smart money accumulation—a 【Whale Accumulation】 signal. Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run), following whales to buy during retail panic, with strict leverage and position limits.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI在41-44区间（中性偏弱），ADX约20（趋势较弱），NATR在1.6%-2.77%（中等波动）。BNB和SOL在Qlib排名前二，但得分均为负值。
technical_signal.en: Technical: All coins have RSI in 41-44 range (neutral-weak), ADX ~20 (weak trend), NATR 1.6%-2.77% (moderate volatility). BNB and SOL rank top-2 in Qlib, but scores are negative.

macro_onchain.en: Whale Flow: ETH 24h net inflow 818K ETH (accelerating accumulation), SOL 24h net inflow 532K SOL (sustained accumulation), with stablecoin net outflows (ETH $-14.5M, SOL $0.43M). Funding rates are negative (ETH -0.0063%, SOL -0.0116%), indicating crowded retail shorts. Z-Score Anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all <-1.45 (low volume), Funding Z-Scores all <-1.04 (significant negative funding), supporting retail panic and potential squeeze.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 41-44（中性偏弱），ADX ~20（趋势弱），NATR中等；2) 影线比率：ETH上影57%/下影9%（上影显著），SOL上影41%/下影4%（上影显著），显示上方阻力；3) 多空爆仓比：ETH 4.04，SOL 25.53（极端多头爆仓）；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH和SOL 24h净流入正。结论：WHALE_ACCUMULATION（鲸鱼托底），因价格下跌中鲸鱼吸筹且零售多头被大量爆仓，但RSI未超卖（>30）且上影显著，需谨慎入场。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 41-44 (neutral-weak), ADX ~20 (weak trend), NATR moderate; 2) Wick Ratios: ETH upper 57%/lower 9% (significant upper), SOL upper 41%/lower 4% (significant upper), indicating overhead resistance; 3) Liquidation L/S ratios: ETH 4.04, SOL 25.53 (extreme long liquidations); 4) Whale net flow: ETH and SOL 24h net inflows positive. Verdict: WHALE_ACCUMULATION, as whales are accumulating during price drops with retail longs heavily flushed, but RSI not oversold (>30) and upper wicks significant, requiring cautious entry.

portfolio_status.zh: 当前持仓：SOL多头（入场价84.45，浮盈1.89%），ETH多头（入场价1972.04，浮盈1.26%），总风险暴露$1007，可用多头额度$841。持仓符合鲸鱼托底策略，但需监控上方阻力。
portfolio_status.en: Portfolio Status: Current positions: SOL long (entry 84.45, PnL 1.89%), ETH long (entry 1972.04, PnL 1.26%), total exposure $1007, available long room $841. Positions align with whale accumulation strategy, but monitor overhead resistance.

reflection.zh: 从历史交易反思：在熊市中，即使有鲸鱼信号，也应等待RSI极端值或影线确认，避免中性RSI入场导致浮动亏损（如之前SOL仓位-11.94%）。本次决策基于鲸鱼吸筹信号，但使用低杠杆和小仓位以管理波动。
reflection.en: Reflection from history: In bear markets, even with whale signals, wait for RSI extremes or wick confirmation to avoid floating losses from neutral RSI entries (e.g., previous SOL position -11.94%). This decision is based on whale accumulation signals, but uses low leverage and small position size to manage volatility.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观风险情绪（VIX 26.33，DXY走强）与加密监管压力（KuCoin事件）构成负面背景，但美联储降息预期（利率期货下跌）和日元疲软提供部分风险偏好支撑。价格下跌伴随零售恐慌（多空爆仓比极高），但鲸鱼数据揭示分化：ETH和SOL出现鲸鱼积累信号（24h净流入），而BTC、BNB、DOGE缺乏链上确认。Qlib排名显示BTC相对最强（-0.0769分），但所有币种得分均为负值，反映整体弱势。结合【痛苦交易】，市场处于“爆仓踩踏”中（L/S比率均>5，零售多头被大量清洗），但ETH和SOL的鲸鱼净流入与价格下跌形成看涨背离，提供“燃料”支撑反弹。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼前置交易）：跟随ETH和SOL的鲸鱼积累信号，在零售恐慌中买入，但严格限制杠杆和仓位以应对熊市风险。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), with negative macro sentiment (VIX 26.33, DXY strengthening) and crypto regulatory pressure (KuCoin incident). However, dovish Fed expectations (rate futures dropping) and Yen weakness offer some risk appetite support. Price declines coincide with retail panic (extremely high L/S ratios), but whale data reveals divergence: ETH and SOL show whale accumulation signals (24h net inflows), while BTC, BNB, and DOGE lack on-chain confirmation. Qlib rankings indicate BTC is relatively strongest (-0.0769 score), but all coins have negative scores, reflecting overall weakness. Combining 【Pain Trade】, the market is in a 'liquidation cascade' (L/S ratios all >5, retail longs heavily flushed), but ETH and SOL's whale net inflows vs price drops form bullish divergences, providing 'fuel' for a bounce. Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run): follow whale accumulation signals in ETH and SOL to buy during retail panic, but strictly limit leverage and position size due to bear market risks.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面普遍超卖：所有币种RSI在41-44区间（未达极端<30），ADX在16-23（趋势强度中等），NATR在1.67%-2.87%（波动率适中）。BTC和SOL趋势为UP，但价格低于近期高点，显示反弹乏力。
technical_signal.en: Technicals are generally oversold: all coins have RSI in 41-44 range (not extreme <30), ADX 16-23 (moderate trend strength), NATR 1.67%-2.87% (moderate volatility). BTC and SOL trends are UP, but prices below recent highs indicate weak bounce momentum.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH（24h净流入1.27M ETH，7d净流出-2.36M ETH）和SOL（24h净流入54.5K SOL，7d净流入2.99M SOL）显示鲸鱼在加速积累，与价格下跌形成背离。资金费率全为负值（-0.0006%至-0.0092%），零售空头拥挤。爆仓数据：所有币种L/S比率>5（BTC 5.76，ETH 6.77，SOL 55.35，BNB 57.11），零售多头被大量清洗，提供轧空燃料。
macro_onchain.en: Whale data: ETH (24h net inflow 1.27M ETH, 7d net outflow -2.36M ETH) and SOL (24h net inflow 54.5K SOL, 7d net inflow 2.99M SOL) show whales accelerating accumulation, diverging from price drops. Funding rates are all negative (-0.0006% to -0.0092%), indicating crowded retail shorts. Liquidation data: all coins have L/S ratios >5 (BTC 5.76, ETH 6.77, SOL 55.35, BNB 57.11), with retail longs heavily flushed, providing squeeze fuel.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：BTC（-0.0769分，第1名）相对最强，但得分均为负值，反映市场整体疲软。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score全为负（-1.44至-1.77），显示成交量萎缩；资金费率Z-Score为负（-0.43至-1.52），统计上偏离均值，确认零售空头过度拥挤。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib rankings: BTC (-0.0769 score, rank 1) is relatively strongest, but all scores are negative, reflecting overall market weakness. Z-Score anomalies: volume Z-Scores all negative (-1.44 to -1.77), indicating volume contraction; funding Z-Scores negative (-0.43 to -1.52), statistically deviating from mean, confirming excessive retail short crowding.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 41-44（未达极端），ADX 16-23（趋势强度中等），NATR 1.67%-2.87%（波动适中）；2) 影线比率：ETH上影21%/下影24%，SOL上影13%/下影25%，显示多空争夺；3) 多空爆仓比均>5，零售多头被大量清洗；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH和SOL为正向积累。最终判断：WHALE_ACCUMULATION（鲸鱼托底），因为价格下跌中鲸鱼积极买入（ETH和SOL净流入），零售多头恐慌性平仓（高L/S比），但RSI未达极端<30，需谨慎入场。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 41-44 (not extreme), ADX 16-23 (moderate trend strength), NATR 1.67%-2.87% (moderate volatility); 2) Wick ratios: ETH upper 21%/lower 24%, SOL upper 13%/lower 25%, showing battle between bulls and bears; 3) L/S ratios all >5, retail longs heavily flushed; 4) Whale net flow: positive accumulation in ETH and SOL. Verdict: WHALE_ACCUMULATION, as whales are actively buying during price drops (ETH and SOL net inflows) while retail longs panic-liquidate (high L/S ratios), but RSI not extreme <30 requires cautious entry.

portfolio_status.zh: 当前无持仓，现金3864.13美元。可用多头额度1845美元（占总权益48%），空头额度1845美元。熊市下需严格控制风险，单笔交易风险不超过2% NAV（约77美元）。

reflection.zh: 从历史交易反思：在熊市中，即使有鲸鱼信号，也需等待RSI极端或影线确认，避免中性RSI入场导致浮动亏损（如之前SOL持仓-11.94%）。本次决策基于ETH和SOL的鲸鱼积累信号，但将使用低杠杆和小仓位，并设置宽松止损以应对波动。
reflection.en: Reflection from history: In bear markets, even with whale signals, wait for RSI extremes or wick confirmation to avoid floating losses from neutral RSI entries (e.g., previous SOL position -11.94%). This decision is based on whale accumulation signals in ETH and SOL, but will use low leverage and small position size with wide stops to manage volatility.

entry_reason.zh: 鲸鱼托底吸筹：价格下跌中鲸鱼24h净流入1.27M ETH（加速积累），零售多头被大量清洗（L/S比6.77），资金费率负（-0.0021%）显示空头拥挤，存在轧空潜力。熊市下使用低杠杆（2x）和小仓位。
entry_reason.en: Whale accumulation: whales net inflow 1.27M ETH in 24h (accelerating accumulation) during price drop, retail longs heavily flushed (L/S ratio 6.77), funding negative (-0.0021%) indicates crowded shorts, squeeze potential. Use low leverage (2x) and small position in bear market.

invalidation.zh: 若价格跌破1900且鲸鱼净流转为流出，或RSI跌破30无反弹，则止损。
invalidation.en: Stop loss if price breaks below 1900 with whale net flow turning negative, or RSI drops below 30 without bounce.

entry_reason.zh: 鲸鱼前置交易：鲸鱼24h净流入54.5K SOL（7d净流入2.99M SOL持续积累），零售多头被极端清洗（L/S比55.35），资金费率负（-0.0032%）空头拥挤，技术面RSI 42未超卖但下影25%显示支撑。熊市下严格风险控制。
entry_reason.en: Whale front-run: whales net inflow 54.5K SOL in 24h (7d net inflow 2.99M SOL sustained accumulation), retail longs extremely flushed (L/S ratio 55.35), funding negative (-0.0032%) shorts crowded, technicals RSI 42 not oversold but lower wick 25% shows support. Strict risk control in bear market.

invalidation.zh: 若价格跌破80且鲸鱼净流转为流出，或ADX升至>30显示下跌动量增强，则止损。
invalidation.en: Stop loss if price breaks below 80 with whale net flow turning negative, or ADX rises >30 indicating strong downtrend momentum.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观风险情绪偏谨慎（VIX高企、DXY走强），但日元疲软暗示部分风险偏好。Qlib排名显示BTC相对最强（得分0.0014），但整体得分偏低，市场缺乏强劲驱动力。技术面普遍中性（RSI 46-50），无极端超买超卖。鲸鱼数据显示ETH和SOL出现分化：ETH 24h净流出（-0.04），而SOL 24h净流入（+0.39），表明鲸鱼在SOL上加速积累。结合【痛苦交易】分析，所有主要币种均出现严重多头爆仓（L/S比率>2），尤其是SOL（21.25）和BNB（23.37），显示零售多头正在被清洗，但价格未大幅下跌，暗示鲸鱼可能在托底吸筹。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼前置交易），跟随SOL的鲸鱼积累信号，在零售恐慌性抛售（多头爆仓）时买入。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), with cautious macro risk sentiment (high VIX, strong DXY), but Yen weakness suggests some risk appetite. Qlib rankings show BTC as relatively strongest (score 0.0014), but overall scores are low, indicating lack of strong drivers. Technicals are neutral (RSI 46-50), with no extreme overbought/oversold conditions. Whale data shows divergence between ETH and SOL: ETH has 24h net outflow (-0.04), while SOL has 24h net inflow (+0.39), indicating accelerated whale accumulation in SOL. Combined with 【Pain Trade】analysis, all major coins show severe long liquidations (L/S ratio >2), especially SOL (21.25) and BNB (23.37), indicating retail longs are being flushed, but prices haven't collapsed, suggesting whales may be accumulating at support. Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run), following SOL's whale accumulation signal to buy during retail panic (long liquidations).

technical_signal.zh: 技术面中性偏弱：BTC RSI 50.4（中性），ETH RSI 49.7（中性），SOL RSI 47.4（略偏弱），BNB RSI 46.7（略偏弱），DOGE RSI 47.0（略偏弱）。ADX普遍<25（趋势弱），NATR 1.5-2.7%（波动率中等）。上下影线显示SOL下影线比例低（6%上影/48%下影），表明近期卖压较强但可能有支撑。
technical_signal.en: Technicals neutral to weak: BTC RSI 50.4 (neutral), ETH RSI 49.7 (neutral), SOL RSI 47.4 (slightly weak), BNB RSI 46.7 (slightly weak), DOGE RSI 47.0 (slightly weak). ADX mostly <25 (weak trend), NATR 1.5-2.7% (moderate volatility). Wick ratios show SOL with low upper wick (6%) and high lower wick (48%), indicating recent selling pressure but potential support.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH 24h净流出137万枚（7d净流出242万枚），稳定币净流出756万美元，显示鲸鱼在减持。SOL 24h净流入5.45万枚（7d净流入299万枚），稳定币净流入30万美元，显示鲸鱼在加速积累。资金费率：BTC 0.0042%（略正），ETH 0.0023%（略正），SOL -0.0088%（负），BNB -0.0061%（负），DOGE -0.0082%（负），SOL和山寨币资金费率为负，表明零售空头拥挤。爆仓数据：所有币种多头爆仓远高于空头（L/S比率>2），SOL多头爆仓317万美元 vs 空头14.9万美元（比率21.25），显示零售多头被大量清洗。
macro_onchain.en: Whale data: ETH 24h net outflow 1.37M tokens (7d net outflow 2.42M), stablecoin net outflow $7.57M, indicating whale distribution. SOL 24h net inflow 54.5K tokens (7d net inflow 2.99M), stablecoin net inflow $300K, indicating accelerated whale accumulation. Funding rates: BTC 0.0042% (slightly positive), ETH 0.0023% (slightly positive), SOL -0.0088% (negative), BNB -0.0061% (negative), DOGE -0.0082% (negative), SOL and altcoins have negative funding, indicating crowded retail shorts. Liquidation data: All coins have long liquidations far exceeding shorts (L/S ratio >2), SOL long $3.17M vs short $149K (ratio 21.25), showing heavy retail long flush.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：BTC（得分0.0014，排名1）相对最强，但得分接近零，表明市场整体弱势。ETH（得分-0.0112，排名2）和山寨币（SOL -0.0357，BNB -0.0387，DOGE -0.0347）得分均为负，显示普遍疲软。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score普遍负值（-1.5至-1.8），表明成交量低于历史均值，市场活跃度低。资金费率Z-Score：BTC 0.36（正常），ETH -0.17（略负），SOL -1.19（显著负），BNB -1.35（显著负），DOGE -1.47（显著负），SOL和山寨币资金费率显著负向偏离，统计上异常，暗示零售空头过度拥挤，存在轧空风险。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib rankings: BTC (score 0.0014, rank 1) is relatively strongest, but score near zero indicates overall market weakness. ETH (score -0.0112, rank 2) and alts (SOL -0.0357, BNB -0.0387, DOGE -0.0347) have negative scores, showing widespread weakness. Z-Score anomalies: Volume Z-Scores are negative (-1.5 to -1.8), indicating below-average volume and low market activity. Funding Z-Scores: BTC 0.36 (normal), ETH -0.17 (slightly negative), SOL -1.19 (significantly negative), BNB -1.35 (significantly negative), DOGE -1.47 (significantly negative), SOL and alts show significant negative deviations, statistically anomalous, suggesting overcrowded retail shorts and squeeze risk.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI中性（47.4），ADX中等（21.1），NATR 2.67%（波动率中等）；2) 上下影线比率：上影6%/下影48%，显示卖压强但下影线长，可能有支撑；3) 多空爆仓比：21.25（极端多头爆仓），零售多头正被清洗；4) 鲸鱼净流向：24h净流入5.45万SOL（加速积累）。结论：WHALE_ACCUMULATION（鲸鱼托底）。理由：价格下跌但鲸鱼在积累（Token Net Flow正），同时零售多头被大量爆仓（L/S比率高），符合鲸鱼在零售恐慌时吸筹的特征。RSI未极端（47.4），但鲸鱼信号强，允许中性RSI入场。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI neutral (47.4), ADX moderate (21.1), NATR 2.67% (moderate volatility); 2) Wick ratios: upper 6%/lower 48%, showing selling pressure but long lower wick suggests potential support; 3) Liquidation L/S ratio: 21.25 (extreme long liquidation), retail longs being flushed; 4) Whale net flow: 24h net inflow 54.5K SOL (accelerated accumulation). Verdict: WHALE_ACCUMULATION. Reason: Price is down but whales are accumulating (positive Token Net Flow), while retail longs are heavily liquidated (high L/S ratio), fitting whale accumulation during retail panic. RSI is not extreme (47.4), but whale signal is strong, allowing entry at neutral RSI.

reflection.en: Reflection from history: In bear markets, even with whale signals, strict wait for RSI extremes or wick confirmation is needed to avoid floating losses from neutral RSI entries (e.g., current SOL position -11.94%). This decision is based on SOL's strong whale accumulation signal (24h net inflow acceleration) and extreme long liquidation (L/S 21.25), but must cautiously control position size due to overall market weakness.

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破84.0（基于NATR 2.67% × 1.5 ≈ 4.0%，从入场价87.20计算），表明鲸鱼积累失败，止损退出。
invalidation.en: If price breaks below 84.0 (based on NATR 2.67% × 1.5 ≈ 4.0% from entry 87.20), whale accumulation fails, stop loss exit.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市，价格低于SMA200，宏观信号矛盾（VIX高但日元弱），无重大新驱动，属于已定价环境。Qlib排名显示BTC/ETH相对最强，SOL/DOGE最弱，但Z-Score显示成交量普遍低迷（vol_z < -1.5），资金费率Z-Score异常（BTC/ETH正，SOL/DOGE负）。【痛苦交易】BTC和BNB存在LONG_FLUSH（多空爆仓比>2），但RSI中性（55/53），未达极端值，禁止追空；SOL有鲸鱼积累（24h净流入61.7K SOL）和负资金费率（-0.0103%），但L/S比高达7.24（多头被大量清洗），需等待RSI<30或下影线确认支撑。【战场纪律】SOL的NATR为2.71%，止损需至少4.07%，当前持仓浮亏-6.67%，风险较高。【假设分析】选择剧本3（鲸鱼前跑）：SOL鲸鱼积累与零售恐慌（负资金费率、高L/S比）形成背离，但需严格等待技术确认。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality】Market is in bear regime (price < SMA200), with mixed macro signals (high VIX but weak JPY), no major new drivers—priced-in environment. Qlib ranks BTC/ETH strongest, SOL/DOGE weakest, but Z-Scores show low volume (vol_z < -1.5) and funding anomalies (BTC/ETH positive, SOL/DOGE negative). 【Pain Trade】BTC and BNB have LONG_FLUSH (L/S ratio >2), but RSI neutral (55/53), not extreme—avoid chasing shorts. SOL shows whale accumulation (24h net inflow 61.7K SOL) and negative funding (-0.0103%), but L/S ratio is 7.24 (longs heavily flushed), requiring RSI <30 or lower wick for support confirmation. 【Tactical Discipline】SOL's NATR is 2.71%, requiring stop loss ≥4.07%; current position has -6.67% floating loss, high risk. 【Scenario】Select Hypothesis 3 (Whale Front-Run): SOL whale accumulation diverges from retail panic (negative funding, high L/S ratio), but strict technical confirmation needed.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：BTC/ETH RSI中性（55/54），趋势向上但ADX弱（~20）；SOL RSI 51.7，ADX 22.1，趋势向上但波动高（NATR 2.71%）；BNB RSI 53，ADX 24.8；DOGE RSI 48.6，趋势向下。影线显示SOL下影线28%（支撑迹象），BNB下影线38%。
technical_signal.en: Technical: BTC/ETH RSI neutral (55/54), trend up but ADX weak (~20); SOL RSI 51.7, ADX 22.1, trend up but high volatility (NATR 2.71%); BNB RSI 53, ADX 24.8; DOGE RSI 48.6, trend down. Wick ratios show SOL lower wick 28% (support sign), BNB lower wick 38%.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：SOL 24h净流入61.7K SOL（7d净流入2.99M SOL），加速积累；稳定币净流入$253K。资金费率：BTC/ETH正（0.0067%/0.0060%），零售偏多；SOL负（-0.0103%），零售偏空。爆仓：BTC/BNB多空比>2（LONG_FLUSH），SOL多空比7.24（LONG_FLUSH），显示零售多头被清洗。
macro_onchain.en: Whale data: SOL 24h net inflow 61.7K SOL (7d inflow 2.99M SOL), accelerating accumulation; stablecoin net inflow $253K. Funding: BTC/ETH positive (0.0067%/0.0060%), retail long-biased; SOL negative (-0.0103%), retail short-biased. Liquidations: BTC/BNB L/S ratio >2 (LONG_FLUSH), SOL L/S ratio 7.24 (LONG_FLUSH), indicating retail longs being flushed.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：BTC（0.0549）和ETH（0.049）最强，SOL（0.017）和DOGE（-0.0117）最弱。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score普遍<-1.5（市场低迷）；资金费率Z-Score：BTC 1.02（偏高），ETH 0.62（中性），SOL -1.39（显著负值），显示SOL零售空头拥挤。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib ranks: BTC (0.0549) and ETH (0.049) strongest, SOL (0.017) and DOGE (-0.0117) weakest. Z-Score anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all <-1.5 (market sluggish); Funding Z-Scores: BTC 1.02 (high), ETH 0.62 (neutral), SOL -1.39 (significantly negative), indicating SOL retail short crowding.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】评估：1) SOL RSI 51.7（中性），ADX 22.1（中等趋势），NATR 2.71%（高波动）；2) 下影线比率28%（支撑迹象）；3) 多空爆仓比7.24（LONG_FLUSH，零售多头被清洗）；4) 鲸鱼净流向正（61.7K SOL流入）。结论：WHALE_ACCUMULATION（鲸鱼托底），因为价格下跌中鲸鱼积累，零售多头恐慌平仓，但RSI未<30，需等待技术确认避免接飞刀。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Assessment: 1) SOL RSI 51.7 (neutral), ADX 22.1 (moderate trend), NATR 2.71% (high volatility); 2) Lower wick ratio 28% (support sign); 3) L/S liquidation ratio 7.24 (LONG_FLUSH, retail longs flushed); 4) Whale net flow positive (61.7K SOL inflow). Verdict: WHALE_ACCUMULATION, as whales accumulate during price drop with retail long panic, but RSI not <30—await technical confirmation to avoid falling knife.

portfolio_status.zh: 当前持仓：SOL浮亏-6.67%（入场价90.44），BNB浮亏-3.29%（入场价656.5）。总风险：多头敞口$1273，可用多头额度$595。SOL持仓风险高（浮亏大，NATR高），需减仓管理风险。
portfolio_status.en: Portfolio: SOL floating loss -6.67% (entry 90.44), BNB floating loss -3.29% (entry 656.5). Total risk: Long exposure $1273, available long room $595. SOL position high risk (large loss, high NATR), requires reduction.

reflection.zh: 从历史交易反思：在熊市中，即使有鲸鱼信号，也需严格等待RSI极端或影线确认，避免中性RSI入场导致浮亏。当前SOL持仓浮亏-6.67%，证明过早入场风险。
reflection.en: Reflection from history: In bear markets, even with whale signals, strict wait for RSI extremes or wick confirmation is needed to avoid floating losses from neutral RSI entries. Current SOL position at -6.67% loss demonstrates premature entry risk.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观环境呈现风险规避（DXY走强，VIX高企），但日元疲软提供矛盾信号。Qlib排名显示BTC和BNB相对最强，但技术面RSI中性（54-55），无明显极端。鲸鱼数据显示ETH和SOL出现分化：ETH呈现24h净流出（-158万ETH），而SOL呈现24h净流入（6.2万SOL），且SOL的24h情绪评分（0.34）显著高于7d（0.06），表明短期鲸鱼加速积累。结合【痛苦交易】，BTC、BNB、SOL均显示L/S爆仓比>2.5（LONG_FLUSH警告），表明零售多头正在被清洗，但SOL的负资金费率（-0.0027%）和鲸鱼流入构成轧空燃料。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼抢先交易）：在SOL上基于鲸鱼积累和轧空潜力开多，但需严格风险管理，避免在熊市中追高。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), with a risk-off macro backdrop (strong DXY, high VIX), though Yen weakness provides a contradictory signal. Qlib rankings show BTC and BNB as relatively strongest, but technicals are neutral (RSI 54-55) with no extremes. Whale data reveals divergence between ETH and SOL: ETH shows 24h net outflow (-1.58M ETH), while SOL shows 24h net inflow (62k SOL), and SOL's 24h sentiment score (0.34) is significantly higher than 7d (0.06), indicating short-term whale accumulation acceleration. Combining 【Pain Trade】, BTC, BNB, and SOL all show L/S liquidation ratios >2.5 (LONG_FLUSH warning), indicating retail longs are being flushed, but SOL's negative funding (-0.0027%) and whale inflow provide squeeze fuel. Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run): Open long on SOL based on whale accumulation and squeeze potential, but with strict risk management to avoid chasing in a bear market.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：BTC、BNB、ETH、SOL的RSI均在48-55区间，处于中性，无超买超卖。ADX值20-26，显示趋势强度中等。SOL的NATR为2.80%，波动性适中。上下影线：SOL的上影线比率53%较高，显示上方阻力，但下影线24%表明支撑。
technical_signal.en: Technicals: RSI for BTC, BNB, ETH, SOL are in the 48-55 range, neutral with no overbought/oversold conditions. ADX values 20-26 indicate moderate trend strength. SOL's NATR is 2.80%, moderate volatility. Wick ratios: SOL has high upper wick ratio (53%) showing resistance, but lower wick (24%) indicates support.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH 24h净流出158万ETH，7d净流出247万ETH，表明鲸鱼在减持。SOL 24h净流入6.2万SOL，7d净流入299万SOL，且24h情绪评分（0.34）高于7d（0.06），显示短期加速积累。资金费率：SOL为负（-0.0027%），零售空头拥挤；BTC、BNB为正（0.0072%、0.0083%），零售多头拥挤。爆仓比：BTC（3.30）、BNB（2.77）、SOL（6.51）均显示LONG_FLUSH，零售多头正被大量清洗。
macro_onchain.en: Whale flow: ETH shows 24h net outflow of 1.58M ETH and 7d outflow of 2.47M ETH, indicating distribution. SOL shows 24h net inflow of 62k SOL and 7d inflow of 2.99M SOL, with 24h sentiment score (0.34) higher than 7d (0.06), signaling short-term accumulation acceleration. Funding rates: SOL is negative (-0.0027%), crowded retail shorts; BTC and BNB are positive (0.0072%, 0.0083%), crowded retail longs. Liquidation ratios: BTC (3.30), BNB (2.77), SOL (6.51) all show LONG_FLUSH, with retail longs being heavily flushed.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：BTC（0.0486分，排名1）和BNB（0.0484分，排名2）相对最强，但技术面中性。Z-Score异常：所有币种的成交量Z-Score均低于-1.48，显示成交量低迷；资金费率Z-Score中，BTC（1.21）和BNB（0.64）为正异常，SOL（-0.39）为负异常，支持SOL的轧空剧本。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib rankings: BTC (score 0.0486, rank 1) and BNB (score 0.0484, rank 2) are relatively strongest, but technicals are neutral. Z-Score anomalies: Volume Z-Scores for all coins are below -1.48, indicating low volume; Funding Z-Scores show BTC (1.21) and BNB (0.64) as positive anomalies, SOL (-0.39) as negative anomaly, supporting SOL's squeeze scenario.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) SOL的RSI=51.2（中性），ADX=22.9（中等趋势），NATR=2.80%（适中波动）；2) 上下影线比率：上影线53%/下影线24%，显示阻力但支撑存在；3) 多空爆仓比：6.51（LONG_FLUSH），零售多头正被清洗；4) 鲸鱼净流向：24h净流入6.2万SOL（积累）。最终判断：WHALE_SQUEEZE（鲸鱼轧空），因为鲸鱼积累+负资金费率+高L/S爆仓比构成轧空燃料，且RSI中性无极端，避免接飞刀或挡火箭风险。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) SOL's RSI=51.2 (neutral), ADX=22.9 (moderate trend), NATR=2.80% (moderate volatility); 2) Wick ratios: upper 53%/lower 24%, showing resistance but support; 3) Liquidation L/S ratio: 6.51 (LONG_FLUSH), retail longs being flushed; 4) Whale net flow: 24h inflow of 62k SOL (accumulation). Verdict: WHALE_SQUEEZE, because whale accumulation + negative funding + high L/S ratio provide squeeze fuel, and neutral RSI avoids knife/rocket risks.

News is mixed with no clear new impulse, and prices likely reflect existing information. Qlib rankings show BTC, BNB, ETH as relatively strong, but Z-Scores indicate low volume (vol_z < -1.5), signaling poor liquidity. Combining 【Pain Trade】, BTC and BNB show LONG_FLUSH (L/S ratio >2.5) with retail longs being flushed, but whale data is absent, requiring caution. SOL has whale accumulation signals (24h net inflow 62k SOL, 24h sentiment 0.29 > 7d 0.04), but LONG_FLUSH (L/S ratio 6.51) indicates retail longs are still being squeezed, with ample fuel. Selected 【Hypothesis】Scenario 3 (Whale Front-Run), following whale accumulation in a bear market with strict risk management.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观信号矛盾：日元疲软（风险偏好）但DXY走强和VIX飙升（风险规避）。新闻面显示ETF资金流入提供支撑，但宏观不确定性主导。这属于已定价的混合叙事，没有新的驱动改变熊市结构。【Qlib排名】BNB（0.1002）和BTC（0.0982）相对最强，但Z-Score显示成交量普遍偏低（vol_z均<-1.1），市场活跃度不足。【痛苦交易】SOL和BNB的L/S爆仓比高达6.52和2.77，显示零售多头被大量清洗，但价格未大幅下跌，暗示鲸鱼可能在托底吸筹。ETH的L/S比1.54较平衡，无极端信号。【假设分析】选择“鲸鱼托底吸筹”剧本：在熊市中，利用零售恐慌（高L/S比）和鲸鱼积累信号（如SOL的24h净流入）进行左侧布局，但需严格风险管理。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200) with conflicting macro signals: JPY weakness (risk-on) vs DXY strength and VIX spike (risk-off). News shows ETF inflows providing support, but macro uncertainty dominates. This is a priced-in mixed narrative with no new impulse to change the bear structure. 【Qlib Ratings】BNB (0.1002) and BTC (0.0982) are relatively strongest, but Z-Scores show low volume activity (vol_z all <-1.1). 【Pain Trade】SOL and BNB have high L/S liquidation ratios (6.52 and 2.77), indicating retail long flush, yet prices haven't collapsed, suggesting whale accumulation. ETH's L/S ratio 1.54 is balanced. 【Scenario】Select 'Whale Accumulation' script: in a bear market, use retail panic (high L/S ratios) and whale accumulation signals (e.g., SOL's 24h net inflow) for left-side entries, with strict risk management.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI中性（48-56），无超买超卖；ADX中等（18-26），趋势强度一般；NATR在1.68%-3.08%，波动率适中。SOL和BNB有较高下影线比率（55%和39%），显示下方支撑。
technical_signal.en: Technicals: All coins have neutral RSI (48-56), no overbought/oversold; ADX moderate (18-26), trend strength average; NATR 1.68%-3.08%, volatility moderate. SOL and BNB have high lower wick ratios (55% and 39%), indicating support.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：SOL显示24h净流入232,726.3 SOL（7d净流入2,989,685.2 SOL），鲸鱼在积累；ETH净流出-4,723,321.7 ETH，鲸鱼在减持。资金费率：所有币种为正但不高（0.0037%-0.0100%），零售多头略拥挤但未极端。爆仓：SOL和BNB的L/S比高（6.52和2.77），零售多头被清洗；BTC的L/S比3.67也高。
macro_onchain.en: Whale Flow: SOL shows 24h net inflow 232,726.3 SOL (7d inflow 2,989,685.2 SOL), whales accumulating; ETH net outflow -4,723,321.7 ETH, whales distributing. Funding: All coins positive but low (0.0037%-0.0100%), retail longs slightly crowded but not extreme. Liquidations: SOL and BNB have high L/S ratios (6.52 and 2.77), retail longs flushed; BTC L/S ratio 3.67 also high.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：BNB（1）和BTC（2）得分最高（0.1002和0.0982），相对强势；DOGE（5）得分最低（0.0096），弱势。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score普遍<-1.1（如SOL -1.48），显示市场活跃度显著偏低；资金费率Z-Score在0.31-1.2，无极端偏差。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib Rankings: BNB (1) and BTC (2) highest scores (0.1002 and 0.0982), relatively strong; DOGE (5) lowest (0.0096), weak. Z-Score Anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all <-1.1 (e.g., SOL -1.48), indicating significantly low activity; Funding Z-Scores 0.31-1.2, no extreme deviations.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI中性（48-56），ADX中等（18-26），NATR适中（1.68%-3.08%），无极端动量；2) SOL和BNB下影线比率高（55%和39%），显示支撑；3) SOL和BNB的L/S爆仓比高（6.52和2.77），零售多头被清洗；4) SOL鲸鱼净流入（积累），ETH净流出（减持）。最终判断：WHALE_ACCUMULATION（鲸鱼托底）——价格下跌中，鲸鱼积累（SOL）且零售多头被清洗，但RSI不极端，适合左侧布局。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI neutral (48-56), ADX moderate (18-26), NATR moderate (1.68%-3.08%), no extreme momentum; 2) SOL and BNB have high lower wick ratios (55% and 39%), showing support; 3) SOL and BNB L/S ratios high (6.52 and 2.77), retail longs flushed; 4) SOL whale net inflow (accumulation), ETH net outflow (distribution). Verdict: WHALE_ACCUMULATION – price dropping, whales accumulating (SOL) and retail longs flushed, but RSI not extreme, suitable for left-side entry.

analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200) with macro risk-off (VIX 23.75, DXY 99.06), but ETF inflows ($462M BTC, $169M ETH) provide support, creating a mixed, priced-in environment. Qlib ranks show BTC (0.0533) and BNB (0.0516) as relatively strongest, but Z-Scores indicate low volume (vol_z -1.5 to -1.9), signaling weak liquidity.【Pain Trade】BTC and BNB have high L/S liquidation ratios (3.33 and 2.77), showing crowded retail longs with squeeze risk; SOL's L/S ratio is extreme at 6.17, but whale data shows 24h net inflow of 197,890 SOL (24h sentiment 0.03 > 7d -0.02), indicating accelerating whale accumulation and potential short squeeze fuel.【Scenario】Selected 'Whale Front-Run' scenario: follow SOL's whale accumulation signal, capitalizing on retail long flush (high L/S ratio) to enter a long position while technicals are neutral.

quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib Analysis: BTC ranks 1st (0.0533), BNB 2nd (0.0516), ETH 3rd (0.042), SOL 4th (0.0298), DOGE 5th (-0.0128). Z-Score Anomalies: All coins have volume Z-Score below -1.5 (e.g., SOL vol_z -1.88), indicating significantly low volume and weak market participation; funding Z-Scores are elevated for ETH and SOL (1.52 and 1.43) but not extreme. SOL ranks low in Qlib, but whale inflow provides a divergence signal.

Verdict: WHALE_SQUEEZE – whales are accumulating while retail longs are being flushed, RSI neutral, squeeze momentum may drive price up without needing extreme RSI.

Qlib rankings show BNB and BTC are relatively strong, but Z-Scores indicate low volume (vol_z all <-1.65) and high funding Z-Scores (ETH and SOL >1.5), suggesting overheated retail sentiment. Combined with 【Pain Trade】, SOL and BNB show clear long liquidation risks (L/S ratio >3), but no extreme RSI or clear whale accumulation signals are present, placing the market in a post-liquidation balance phase with partial fuel burned. Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run), but awaiting whale confirmation or extreme RSI.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI中性（40-60），ADX中等（<30），NATR中等，无极端动量；2) 上下影线比率显示部分支撑（SOL下影线43%，BNB下影线28%），但未达0.3阈值；3) 多空爆仓比：SOL为7.12，BNB为3.03，BTC为3.43，显示多头被大量清洗，燃料已消耗；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH流出，SOL流入但矛盾，无明确积累。最终判断：SAFE_MR（安全均值回归）——市场处于爆仓后的平衡，RSI未极端，鲸鱼信号不明确，避免追涨杀跌。

Final verdict: SAFE_MR (Safe Mean Reversion) – market in post-liquidation balance, RSI not extreme, whale signals unclear, avoid chasing moves.

Funding: BTC and ETH positive (0.0061%/0.0069%), retail long crowded; SOL negative (-0.0015%), retail short crowded. Liquidation ratios: BTC L/S=4.11, ETH L/S=2.48, SOL L/S=2.92, all showing heavy long flush.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：BNB（0.1316分，第1）相对最强，但技术面未超买；BTC（0.0988分，第2）和ETH（0.0674分，第3）中等；SOL（0.0554分，第4）和DOGE（0.01分，第5）较弱。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score普遍为负（-0.9至-1.4），显示市场活跃度低；资金费率Z-Score中，BTC和ETH为正（0.91/0.93），SOL为负（-0.16），暗示SOL存在空头挤压潜力。

Z-Score anomalies: Volume Z-Scores negative (-0.9 to -1.4), indicating low activity; Funding Z-Scores show BTC and ETH positive (0.91/0.93), SOL negative (-0.16), suggesting SOL has short squeeze potential.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI中性（53.1-58.6），ADX中等（21.1-25.9），NATR中低（1.78%-3.33%），无强烈趋势动量；2) 影线比率：SOL下影线60%（较高支撑），BNB下影线89%（极高支撑）；3) 多空爆仓比：BTC 4.11，ETH 2.48，SOL 2.92，均>2，显示多头正被清洗；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH流出（看跌），SOL流入但稳定币流出（矛盾）。结论：WHALE_SQUEEZE（鲸鱼轧空）——SOL因负资金费率和低RSI，结合高L/S比，存在空头挤压燃料，但需价格突破确认。

Verdict: WHALE_SQUEEZE – SOL has short squeeze fuel due to negative funding and low RSI, combined with high L/S ratio, pending price breakout confirmation.

reflection.zh: 从历史交易中学到：在熊市中开仓需严格依赖鲸鱼信号和爆仓燃料，避免在RSI中性时追涨杀跌。当前SOL持仓浮亏，但空头挤压剧本仍有效，需管理风险。
reflection.en: Learned from history: In bear markets, entries must strictly rely on whale signals and liquidation fuel, avoiding chasing moves at neutral RSI. Current SOL position is underwater, but short squeeze scenario remains valid, requiring risk management.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观呈现Risk-Off背景（VIX高、DXY强），但Layer 2新闻混合（降息预期与机构采用）。价格走势与宏观情绪基本一致，无明显新驱动力，属于已定价状态。Qlib排名显示BNB（0.0623分）和BTC（0.0567分）相对最强，但Z-Score显示所有币种成交量均显著偏低（vol_z < -1.5），市场流动性不足。结合【痛苦交易】，ETH和BTC存在LONG_FLUSH（多空爆仓比>3），但RSI未达极端（56.04/53.25），无明确反转信号；SOL和BNB爆仓比平衡，燃料有限。选择【假设分析】剧本3（Whale Front-Run），基于鲸鱼数据寻找智能资金积累信号，但需严格遵循熊市规则（偏空，仅在有极端积累时做多）。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), with a Risk-Off macro backdrop (high VIX, strong DXY), but Layer 2 news is mixed (rate cut expectations and institutional adoption). Price action aligns with macro sentiment, no new impulse drivers, likely priced in. Qlib rankings show BNB (0.0623 score) and BTC (0.0567 score) as relatively strongest, but Z-Scores indicate significantly low volume across all coins (vol_z < -1.5), suggesting poor liquidity. Combining 【Pain Trade】, ETH and BTC show LONG_FLUSH (L/S ratio >3), but RSI is not extreme (56.04/53.25), lacking clear reversal signals; SOL and BNB have balanced liquidation ratios, limited fuel. Selected 【Hypothesis】Scenario 3 (Whale Front-Run), seeking smart money accumulation signals from whale data, but must strictly adhere to bear regime rules (bias short, longs only with extreme accumulation).

Z-Score Anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all <-1.5, indicating significantly low volume vs historical mean, low market participation; Funding Z-Scores near 0 (ETH 0.81, BTC 0.78), no statistically significant deviations.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI中性（48-56），ADX中等（20-26），NATR低（1.74%-3.29%），无极端动量；2) 影线比率：ETH下影线27%较高，显示支撑，其他币种影线中等；3) 多空爆仓比：ETH和BTC >3（LONG_FLUSH），SOL和BNB ~1.25-1.89（平衡）；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH流出（负），SOL流入（正）。综合：ETH和BTC处于LONG_FLUSH，但RSI未<30，ADX<25，鲸鱼未积累，属于【KNIFE】风险（接飞刀），不宜做多；SOL有鲸鱼积累但爆仓比平衡，RSI中性，属于【WHALE_SQUEEZE】潜力，但需等待更强信号。

Verdict: ETH and BTC in LONG_FLUSH but RSI not <30, ADX<25, whales not accumulating, 【KNIFE】 risk (falling knife), avoid longs; SOL has whale accumulation but balanced liquidation, RSI neutral, 【WHALE_SQUEEZE】 potential, but need stronger signals.

analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality】Market is in a bear regime (all coins below SMA200), but macro shows conflicting signals: Fed dovish expectations (rate cuts) vs risk-off sentiment (strong DXY, high VIX). This is a priced-in bear environment with no new impulse drivers. 【Qlib Ranking】shows BTC (0.1682) and ETH (0.1299) as relatively strongest, but all coins have RSI in 50-70 range, no extreme overbought/oversold conditions. 【Pain Trade】SOL and BNB have clear squeeze fuel (L/S ratios 0.25 and 0.01), but SOL's whale inflow is slowing (24h vs 7d), while BNB lacks whale data requiring caution. 【Scenario】Select 'Whale Squeeze' scenario, prioritizing SOL and BNB squeeze opportunities, but await right-side confirmation to avoid left-side chasing.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市格局（价格低于SMA200），宏观风险偏好下降（DXY走强，VIX飙升），但Layer 2叙事提供部分支撑。价格走势与宏观环境基本一致，属于已定价状态，无明显新驱动力。Qlib排名显示BTC（0.1298）和ETH（0.0922）相对最强，但Z-Score显示成交量普遍偏低（vol_z均<-1.5），市场活跃度不足。结合【痛苦交易】分析，SOL和BNB存在明显的轧空燃料（L/S比率分别为0.18和0.01），但当前RSI处于中性区间（57-59），未达到极端值，需等待右侧确认信号。选择【假设分析】中的“鲸鱼轧空”剧本，优先关注SOL和BNB的潜在轧空机会，但严格遵守熊市规则（仅限极端信号+低杠杆）。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200) with declining risk appetite (DXY strengthening, VIX spiking), though Layer 2 narratives provide some support. Price action aligns with the macro environment, indicating it's largely priced in with no new catalysts. Qlib rankings show BTC (0.1298) and ETH (0.0922) as relatively strongest, but Z-Scores indicate low volume activity (vol_z all <-1.5). 【Pain Trade】 analysis reveals squeeze fuel in SOL and BNB (L/S ratios 0.18 and 0.01), but RSI is neutral (57-59), not extreme, requiring right-side confirmation. Selected 【Scenario】 is 'Whale Squeeze', focusing on SOL and BNB potential, but strictly adhering to bear market rules (only extreme signals + low leverage).

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：BTC RSI 63.22（中性偏强），ETH RSI 59.36（中性），SOL RSI 57.5（中性），BNB RSI 58.5（中性），DOGE RSI 52.9（中性）。ADX普遍在20-25之间，趋势强度中等。NATR显示波动率适中（BTC 2.09%，SOL 2.98%）。
technical_signal.en: Technical: BTC RSI 63.22 (neutral-strong), ETH RSI 59.36 (neutral), SOL RSI 57.5 (neutral), BNB RSI 58.5 (neutral), DOGE RSI 52.9 (neutral). ADX mostly 20-25, moderate trend strength. NATR shows moderate volatility (BTC 2.09%, SOL 2.98%).

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH 24小时净流出121.6万ETH，稳定币净流出1394万美元，显示鲸鱼在减持。SOL 24小时净流入133.6万SOL，稳定币净流出6.6万美元，鲸鱼在积累但力度减弱（7天趋势为负）。资金费率：BTC和DOGE较高（0.0100%），显示零售多头拥挤；SOL接近零（0.0001%），零售空头可能过度。
macro_onchain.en: Whale Data: ETH 24h net outflow 1.216M ETH, stablecoin outflow $13.9M, indicating whale distribution. SOL 24h net inflow 1.336M SOL, stablecoin outflow $65.8K, whales accumulating but weakening (7d trend negative). Funding: BTC and DOGE high (0.0100%), retail long crowding; SOL near zero (0.0001%), potential retail short overextension.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：BTC（1）、ETH（2）、BNB（3）、SOL（4）、DOGE（5）。BTC和ETH得分最高，但Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score普遍<-1.5（显著低于均值），资金费率Z-Score BTC 1.98（偏高），SOL 0.12（中性）。这表明市场流动性不足，BTC多头可能过热。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib Rankings: BTC (1), ETH (2), BNB (3), SOL (4), DOGE (5). BTC and ETH highest scores, but Z-Score anomalies: volume Z-Scores all <-1.5 (significantly below mean), funding Z-Score BTC 1.98 (high), SOL 0.12 (neutral). This indicates low market liquidity and potential BTC long overheating.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI中性（52-63），ADX中等（20-25），NATR适中；2) 影线比率：SOL上影19%/下影4%（支撑较强），BNB上影27%/下影36%（平衡）；3) 多空爆仓比：SOL 0.18（空头拥挤），BNB 0.01（极端空头拥挤），BTC 2.79（多头拥挤）；4) 鲸鱼净流向：SOL流入（积极），ETH流出（消极）。最终判断：SOL和BNB为WHALE_SQUEEZE（鲸鱼轧空），因鲸鱼积累+极端空头拥挤+RSI中性；BTC为ROCKET（挡火箭），因多头拥挤+高RSI+高资金费率。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI neutral (52-63), ADX moderate (20-25), NATR moderate; 2) Wick Ratios: SOL upper 19%/lower 4% (strong support), BNB upper 27%/lower 36% (balanced); 3) L/S Liquidation Ratios: SOL 0.18 (short crowded), BNB 0.01 (extreme short crowded), BTC 2.79 (long crowded); 4) Whale Net Flow: SOL inflow (positive), ETH outflow (negative). Verdict: SOL and BNB are WHALE_SQUEEZE due to whale accumulation + extreme short crowding + neutral RSI; BTC is ROCKET due to long crowding + high RSI + high funding.

portfolio_status.zh: 当前持仓：SOL多头（浮亏-1.53%），BNB多头（浮亏-1.95%）。总多头敞口$1290，可用多头额度$587，未超限。需管理现有头寸，避免在熊市中过度暴露。
portfolio_status.en: Portfolio: SOL long (floating PnL -1.53%), BNB long (floating PnL -1.95%). Total long exposure $1290, available long room $587, within limits. Need to manage existing positions to avoid overexposure in bear market.
